name: Information Return Dispute Burden Shift

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must assert a reasonable dispute regarding a third-party information return and fully cooperate with IRS requests for witnesses and documents.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: If a taxpayer reasonably disputes an item on a third-party information return (like a 1099) and cooperates with the IRS, the burden shifts to the IRS to produce additional probative information.
